title: Kenyan Cabbage Salad (Indian-Style)
description: A refreshing and crunchy salad featuring Kenyan cabbage, tender ingredients, and a hint of Indian spices. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. Rinse the Kenyan cabbage and tender salad greens, and chop them into bite-sized pieces.
2. Slice the crunchy cucumber into thin rounds.
3. In a large bowl, combine the chopped cabbage, salad greens, and cucumber slices.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the salad dressing, toasted cumin seeds, and salt.
5. Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss to coat.
6. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
